name: omics-analysis
description: Codex plugin for reproducible omics analysis workflows, including universal nf-core execution, single-cell RNA-seq QC, and scvi-tools model workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Reproducible nf-core, scRNA QC, and scvi-tools workflows.
interface.longDescription: Plan, validate, execute, and report reproducible omics workflows from Codex through structured run specs, deterministic scripts, manifests, and reports.
defaultPrompt: Inspect an input directory and generate a safe omics workflow plan.
Prepare an nf-core run for FASTQ data.
Run scRNA-seq QC on an h5ad file.
